title: Create Modpack
description: In this modpack you upgrade from the prehistoric times to the present times.
body:
With this modpack you upgrade from the prehistoric times to the present times. It has Create, Create: New Age, and AdAstra.

It has a mod called Immersive Aircraft, you can make airplanes which work with coal. It has Xaeros World and Xaeros Minimap too!

It has Create: Diesel Generators and Create Nuclear you can make diesel engines and nuclear power plants and these make energy.

The Create: New Age electricity works with AdAstra. It has performace booster mods too but we recommend a Nvidia GTX GPU or higher!
